title: G.E.N.E.S.I.S
fullTitle: Generative Engine for Networked, Embedded, Spatial Infrastructure Synthesis
description: Rule-aware generative system that automates urban layout planning from scratch. Converts site boundaries into code-compliant city layouts with road networks, blocks, and subdivided plots. Enforces Indian NBC regulations inside the generation loop.
overview: GENESIS is a rule-aware generative system that automates urban layout planning from scratch. Given only a site boundary and basic parameters, it outputs a fully code-compliant city layout – complete with road networks, city blocks, and subdivided plots. It enforces Indian National Building Code (NBC) regulations directly inside the generation loop, runs fast physics-proxy simulations for traffic, drainage, and wind, and scores each generated layout using a multi-domain KPI framework.

features.label: Automated Boundary-to-Layout Generation
features.description: Converts raw site boundaries and basic parameters into complete urban layouts: road networks, blocks, and individual plots. Multiple candidate layouts are generated per run.

features.label: Regulation-by-Design (Fail-Fast Compliance Engine)
features.description: Constraints are enforced inside the generation loop, not after. Infeasible layouts are rejected early and regenerated automatically.

features.label: Traffic Proxy Simulation
features.description: Graph-based shortest path assignment over the generated road network. Congestion penalty computation at each edge. Level of Service (LOS) metrics extracted.

features.label: Drainage Proxy Simulation
features.description: D8 flow accumulation algorithm used to simulate surface water runoff. Flood-risk penalty zones are identified and scored.

features.label: Wind/Ventilation Proxy Simulation
features.description: Gaussian wake propagation model used to approximate ventilation corridors between buildings.

features.label: KPI-Based Scoring and Ranking Engine
features.description: All simulation outputs normalized into KPIs, aggregated into composite score (0–100), ranked with Top-K selector.

algorithms.name: Generative Layout Synthesis
algorithms.description: Procedural generation pipeline: site boundary → road network generation → block formation → plot subdivision.

algorithms.name: Rule Engine (Compliance-by-Design)
algorithms.description: Deterministic constraint enforcement: Generate → Validate → Fail? Regenerate → Pass? Simulate + Score.

algorithms.name: Traffic Proxy Simulation
algorithms.description: Graph-based shortest path assignment with congestion penalties and LOS metrics.

algorithms.name: Drainage Proxy Simulation
algorithms.description: D8 flow accumulation algorithm for surface water runoff simulation.

algorithms.name: Wind/Ventilation Proxy Simulation
algorithms.description: Gaussian wake propagation for ventilation corridor scoring.

algorithms.name: KPI Scoring and Ranking
algorithms.description: Weighted aggregation producing composite score (0–100) with Top-K ranking.

modules.name: Input Layer
modules.responsibility: Boundary input (map-draw / polygon import), parameter config

modules.name: Generation Layer
modules.responsibility: Road generator, block generator, plot generator, multi-candidate controller

modules.name: Compliance Layer
modules.responsibility: Road width validator, FAR/setback validator, plot constraint validator, fail-fast regeneration

modules.name: Simulation Layer
modules.responsibility: Traffic module, drainage module, wind module

modules.name: KPI + Ranking Layer
modules.responsibility: KPI extraction, normalization, weighted scoring, Top-K selector

modules.name: Export Layer
modules.responsibility: JSON exporter, OBJ/MTL exporter, SUMO XML exporter

modules.name: UI Layer
modules.responsibility: Streamlit orchestration, visualization panels, download interface

results: Automated layout synthesis functional (roads, blocks, plots)
Rule-aware compliance enforced at design time
Multi-domain proxy simulations integrated and validated
Export pipeline completed (JSON, OBJ, SUMO XML)
